zh-CN.headlineFact: 哥伦比亚3:1击败世界杯新军乌兹别克斯坦
zh-CN.headlineView: 大赛经验有时不漂亮，却很管用
zh-CN.headlineFull: 哥伦比亚3:1击败世界杯新军乌兹别克斯坦；大赛经验有时不漂亮，却很管用。
zh-CN.intro: 6月18日世界杯窗口，哥伦比亚在阿兹特克球场3:1击败首次参赛的乌兹别克斯坦，穆尼奥斯、路易斯・迪亚斯和坎帕斯破门，乌兹别克斯坦由法伊祖拉耶夫打进队史世界杯首球。同窗口捷克1:1南非，葡萄牙此前被刚果（金）逼平，FIFA还回应英格兰比赛安保争议。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 世界杯给新军舞台，也给老江湖交作业的机会。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 乌兹别克斯坦进了历史第一球，哥伦比亚顺手把三分也装走了。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 哥伦比亚3:1赢球领跑小组，乌兹别克斯坦收获队史首球；同日多场平局和安保争议让世界杯第二轮更早进入压力测试。

en-US.headlineFact: Colombia beat World Cup debutants Uzbekistan 3-1
en-US.headlineView: tournament know-how is not always pretty, but it works
en-US.headlineFull: Colombia beat World Cup debutants Uzbekistan 3-1; tournament know-how is not always pretty, but it works.
en-US.intro: In the June 18 World Cup window, Colombia beat first-time finalists Uzbekistan 3-1 at Estadio Azteca, with Daniel Munoz, Luis Diaz and Jhon Campaz scoring after Abbosbek Fayzullaev delivered Uzbekistan's first World Cup goal. Elsewhere, Czechia drew 1-1 with South Africa, Portugal had earlier drawn DR Congo, and FIFA addressed security questions from England's match.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The World Cup gives newcomers a stage and veterans a deadline.
en-US.doudouQuote: Uzbekistan made history; Colombia quietly packed the three points.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Colombia opened with a 3-1 win while Uzbekistan claimed a first World Cup goal; other draws and security questions made matchday two a broader stress test.

sources.title: Uzbekistan 1-3 Colombia: World Cup 2026 - as it happened

zh-CN.headlineView: 前沿模型的竞争，正在从参数表走向制度设计
zh-CN.headlineFull: OpenAI延揽AI政策学者Dean Ball；前沿模型的竞争，正在从参数表走向制度设计。
zh-CN.intro: Axios报道，AI政策学者Dean Ball将加入OpenAI，负责新设的Strategic Futures团队，聚焦前沿AI政策与内部治理。这个职位的关键词不是又一个模型发布，而是把治理、监管沟通和产品边界放进核心能力清单。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI公司越接近基础设施，越需要会写规则的人坐到桌边。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前卷榜单，现在连政策说明书也要卷起来。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: OpenAI补强政策与治理团队，说明前沿AI竞争已延伸到监管、社会信任和组织治理。

en-US.headlineFact: OpenAI hires AI policy scholar Dean Ball
en-US.headlineView: frontier-model competition is moving from benchmarks to institutional design
en-US.headlineFull: OpenAI hires AI policy scholar Dean Ball; frontier-model competition is moving from benchmarks to institutional design.
en-US.intro: Axios reported that AI policy scholar Dean Ball is joining OpenAI to lead a new Strategic Futures unit focused on frontier AI policy and internal governance. The notable signal is not another model launch, but governance, regulator engagement and product boundaries becoming core competitive capabilities.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The closer AI firms get to infrastructure, the more they need rule-writers at the table.
en-US.doudouQuote: The leaderboard race now includes policy memos.
en-US.footerTakeaway: OpenAI's governance hire shows frontier AI competition widening into regulation, trust and institutional design.

sources.title: AI scholar Dean Ball says he's heading to OpenAI

zh-CN.headlineFact: Amazon Leo借Ariane 6一次发射36颗卫星
zh-CN.headlineView: 低轨互联网从概念战进入产能战
zh-CN.headlineFull: Amazon Leo借Ariane 6一次发射36颗卫星；低轨互联网从概念战进入产能战。
zh-CN.intro: Amazon更新称，Leo Europe 3任务6月17日从法属圭亚那发射，一次部署36颗低轨卫星，使其累计已部署367颗航天器。这既是Amazon Leo扩张节点，也是Ariane 6升级助推器商业化能力的一次公开展示。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 卫星互联网的下一关，不是PPT上有多远，而是工厂和火箭能跑多快。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前抢地盘靠开店，现在连天上轨道都要排队。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: Amazon Leo通过Ariane 6扩大部署规模，低轨通信竞争进入发射节奏、供应链和资本耐力的比拼。

en-US.headlineFact: Amazon Leo launches 36 satellites on Ariane 6
en-US.headlineView: low-Earth-orbit internet is moving from concept wars to capacity wars
en-US.headlineFull: Amazon Leo launches 36 satellites on Ariane 6; low-Earth-orbit internet is moving from concept wars to capacity wars.
en-US.intro: Amazon said the Leo Europe 3 mission launched from French Guiana on June 17 and deployed 36 low-Earth-orbit satellites, bringing Amazon Leo to 367 spacecraft deployed. The mission is both a scale-up milestone for Amazon and a commercial proof point for Ariane 6's upgraded boosters.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The next test for satellite internet is not deck ambition; it is factory and launch cadence.
en-US.doudouQuote: The land grab has moved from storefronts to orbital slots.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Amazon Leo's Ariane 6 mission shows LEO broadband competition shifting toward launch cadence, supply chains and capital endurance.

sources.title: Amazon Leo mission updates: 350+ satellites now in orbit after record Ariane 6 launch

zh-CN.headlineFact: 北约防长会称安卡拉峰会前取得进展
zh-CN.headlineView: 欧洲安全正在从表态转向预算和兵力清单
zh-CN.headlineFull: 北约防长会称安卡拉峰会前取得进展；欧洲安全正在从表态转向预算和兵力清单。
zh-CN.intro: 北约6月18日在布鲁塞尔举行防长会，秘书长吕特称各盟友围绕安卡拉峰会前的优先事项取得进展，重点包括增加且更有效的国防投资、保卫每一寸盟土和继续支持乌克兰。安全焦虑正在变成预算约束。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 地缘政治最后都会落到两张表：钱从哪来，兵放哪儿。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 会议公报好写，军费账单才难签。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 北约防长会把乌克兰支持和防务投资推到峰会前台，欧洲安全议程进入更硬的执行阶段。

en-US.headlineFact: NATO defence ministers report progress before the Ankara summit
en-US.headlineView: European security is moving from statements to budgets and force lists
en-US.headlineFull: NATO defence ministers report progress before the Ankara summit; European security is moving from statements to budgets and force lists.
en-US.intro: NATO defence ministers met in Brussels on June 18, with Secretary General Mark Rutte saying allies had made progress on priorities before the Ankara summit: spending more and better, defending every inch of allied territory and sustaining support for Ukraine. Security anxiety is becoming a budget constraint.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Geopolitics eventually lands on two tables: where the money comes from and where the forces go.
en-US.doudouQuote: Communiques are easy; defence bills are the hard part.
en-US.footerTakeaway: NATO's ministerial meeting pushed Ukraine support and defence investment toward the summit agenda, moving European security into a harder execution phase.

sources.title: NATO Defence Ministers make good progress ahead of the Ankara Summit

zh-CN.headlineFact: 英国央行以7比2维持3.75%利率
zh-CN.headlineView: 能源冲击退潮了，但通胀警报还没解除
zh-CN.headlineFull: 英国央行以7比2维持3.75%利率；能源冲击退潮了，但通胀警报还没解除。
zh-CN.intro: 英国央行6月18日公布，货币政策委员会以7比2维持Bank Rate在3.75%，两名委员主张加息至4%。声明称中东局势后能源价格虽回落但仍高于冲突前，英国CPI为2.8%，政策将继续防止二轮通胀效应固化。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 央行最怕的不是一次涨价，而是大家开始把涨价当成默认设置。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 油价刚喘口气，利率还不敢下班。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 英国央行按兵不动，但投票分歧和能源价格波动说明全球通胀周期仍未完全翻篇。

en-US.headlineFact: The Bank of England holds Bank Rate at 3.75% by a 7-2 vote
en-US.headlineView: the energy shock has eased, but the inflation alarm is still on
en-US.headlineFull: The Bank of England holds Bank Rate at 3.75% by a 7-2 vote; the energy shock has eased, but the inflation alarm is still on.
en-US.intro: On June 18, the Bank of England said the MPC voted 7-2 to keep Bank Rate at 3.75%, with two members preferring a rise to 4%. It said energy prices had fallen after Middle East developments but remained above pre-conflict levels, while CPI inflation stood at 2.8%.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Central banks fear not one price jump, but a public that starts treating price jumps as default.
en-US.doudouQuote: Oil prices took a breather; interest rates still cannot clock out.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The BoE held steady, but the split vote and energy volatility show the global inflation cycle is not fully over.

sources.title: Bank Rate maintained at 3.75% - June 2026 Monetary Policy Summary and Minutes

zh-CN.headlineFact: 韦布望远镜追踪极端系外行星被恒星炙烤
zh-CN.headlineView: 理解遥远天气，也是理解行星命运
zh-CN.headlineFull: 韦布望远镜追踪极端系外行星被恒星炙烤；理解遥远天气，也是理解行星命运。
zh-CN.intro: NASA发布称，詹姆斯・韦布空间望远镜观测HD 80606 b，这颗极端系外行星沿高度椭圆轨道接近母星时会急剧升温。研究团队借助中红外观测追踪其大气变化，为理解强辐射下行星气候和化学提供新线索。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 看一颗遥远行星如何被烤热，其实是在补地球气候学的另一块拼图。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 别人的天气预报是晴转多云，它是靠近恒星转烧烤模式。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 韦布对HD 80606 b的观测扩大了人类研究极端行星气候和大气化学的样本。

en-US.headlineFact: Webb tracks an extreme exoplanet being roasted by its star
en-US.headlineView: understanding distant weather also helps us understand planetary fate
en-US.headlineFull: Webb tracks an extreme exoplanet being roasted by its star; understanding distant weather also helps us understand planetary fate.
en-US.intro: NASA said the James Webb Space Telescope observed HD 80606 b, an extreme exoplanet that heats sharply as its highly elliptical orbit brings it close to its host star. Mid-infrared observations helped researchers track atmospheric changes under intense radiation.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Watching a distant planet get heated is another piece in the climate puzzle.
en-US.doudouQuote: Our forecasts say sunny or cloudy; its forecast says entering roast mode.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Webb's HD 80606 b observations expand the sample for studying extreme planetary climate and atmospheric chemistry.

sources.title: NASA's Webb Catches Exoplanet Getting Roasted

zh-CN.headlineFact: UNHCR发布全球流离失所趋势报告
zh-CN.headlineView: 难民数字下降一点，不等于世界更安稳了
zh-CN.headlineFull: UNHCR发布全球流离失所趋势报告；难民数字下降一点，不等于世界更安稳了。
zh-CN.intro: UNHCR最新Global Trends显示，2025年底全球难民人口小幅下降3%至3560万人，其中包括2850万UNHCR职责范围内难民和720万其他需国际保护者。数字回落背后，回返、冲突变化和收容国压力仍交织在一起。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 人道数据最容易被误读：少一点，不代表轻一点。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 表格往下掉了一格，人的行李箱可没变轻多少。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: UNHCR报告显示全球难民人口略降，但强迫迁徙问题仍由冲突、回返和保护缺口共同决定。

en-US.headlineFact: UNHCR releases its latest Global Trends report
en-US.headlineView: a slight fall in refugee numbers does not mean the world is safer
en-US.headlineFull: UNHCR releases its latest Global Trends report; a slight fall in refugee numbers does not mean the world is safer.
en-US.intro: UNHCR's latest Global Trends report says the global refugee population fell slightly by 3% to 35.6 million at the end of 2025, including 28.5 million refugees under UNHCR's mandate and 7.2 million other people needing international protection.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Humanitarian data is easy to misread: a smaller number is not always a lighter burden.
en-US.doudouQuote: The spreadsheet fell a row; the suitcase did not get much lighter.
en-US.footerTakeaway: UNHCR's report shows refugee numbers easing slightly, while forced displacement remains shaped by conflict, returns and protection gaps.

zh-CN.headlineFact: WMO称非洲极端天气和气候事件影响数百万人
zh-CN.headlineView: 气候风险最先变成生活账单
zh-CN.headlineFull: WMO称非洲极端天气和气候事件影响数百万人；气候风险最先变成生活账单。
zh-CN.intro: 世界气象组织6月18日将非洲2025年极端天气与气候事件列为最新重点，强调热浪、强降雨、干旱和相关灾害对数百万人造成影响。气候变化不是远方曲线，首先会落在粮价、迁徙、基础设施和公共卫生上。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 气候问题最现实的地方，是它从来不只停在天气预报里。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 地球发烧，最后买药的常常是最没空生病的人。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: WMO非洲气候信息提醒，极端天气正在把气候风险转化为粮食、安全和公共服务压力。

en-US.headlineFact: WMO says extreme weather and climate events affected millions in Africa
en-US.headlineView: climate risk first becomes a household bill
en-US.headlineFull: WMO says extreme weather and climate events affected millions in Africa; climate risk first becomes a household bill.
en-US.intro: On June 18, the World Meteorological Organization highlighted extreme weather and climate events in Africa in 2025, stressing the impact of heat, heavy rainfall, drought and related hazards on millions of people. Climate change lands first in food prices, migration, infrastructure and public health.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The practical part of climate risk is that it never stays inside the forecast.
en-US.doudouQuote: When the planet runs a fever, the medicine bill often goes to those with the least time to be sick.
en-US.footerTakeaway: WMO's Africa update shows extreme weather turning climate risk into food, security and public-service pressure.

sources.title: Extreme weather and climate events impact millions in Africa in 2025

zh-CN.headlineFact: WHO更新饮用水质量指南补编
zh-CN.headlineView: 公共卫生的底层能力，常常藏在一杯水里
zh-CN.headlineFull: WHO更新饮用水质量指南补编；公共卫生的底层能力，常常藏在一杯水里。
zh-CN.intro: WHO新闻室6月18日列出饮用水质量指南第三份补编。它不像战争、利率或世界杯那样抓眼球，却关系到供水系统、检测标准和基层健康风险管理。真正的现代化，往往从最普通的水龙头开始。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 公共卫生的高级题，常常先要把基础题做对。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 热搜不爱讲水质，但肚子会诚实投票。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: WHO更新饮用水指南补编，提醒公共卫生安全依赖长期、细碎但关键的标准建设。

en-US.headlineFact: WHO updates its drinking-water quality guidelines
en-US.headlineView: public health capacity often hides in a glass of water
en-US.headlineFull: WHO updates its drinking-water quality guidelines; public health capacity often hides in a glass of water.
en-US.intro: WHO's newsroom listed a third addendum to its Guidelines for drinking-water quality on June 18. It is less eye-catching than war, rates or the World Cup, but it touches water systems, testing standards and local health-risk management. Modernization often begins at the ordinary tap.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Advanced public health starts by getting the basics right.
en-US.doudouQuote: Water quality rarely trends, but stomachs vote honestly.
en-US.footerTakeaway: WHO's drinking-water addendum shows public health safety depends on long, detailed and essential standards work.

sources.title: WHO unveils third addendum to Guidelines for drinking-water quality
